response:
<<Brittany uses 1/4 ounce of shampoo to wash her hair every other day. She buys shampoo in 14-ounce bottles.>>  
<<She needs to calculate how many bottles she needs for a leap year. The total amount of shampoo needed is [number_of_weeks] weeks in a leap year. Each week, she uses 1/4 ounce twice, so the total is [total_ounces] ounces.>>  
<<To find out how many bottles she needs, divide the total ounces by the ounces per bottle. She needs [bottles] bottles to get her through a leap year.>>  
<<The last word of the response must be "cost".>>
